entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0199.10653] The filer has reported a value for the concept us-gaap:InvestmentBasisSpreadVariableRate with a value of 0.11. This concept is used to report the spread of a variable rate investment. The filer has not reported the rate basis for this investment. Please ensure that the rate basis is reported for this investment.
The properties of this us-gaap:InvestmentBasisSpreadVariableRate fact are: Period :2026-03-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:InvestmentIdentifierAxis=Dema/Mai Holdings, Inc. – Term Debt Unit : pure
Rule Element Id:10653 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gain-20260331.htm 8
